vibe: Authority, clarity, functional beauty, technical precision, objective.

scales.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-5xl font-black tracking-tight leading-none
scales.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl font-bold tracking-tight leading-none

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: High density, control room grid layout. Every pixel utilized. Priority to scanability and functional density.
spacing_and_layout.surface_strategy: Grid Borders (Technical Look). Expose the skeleton. Minimal shadow, relying on 1px solid strokes for structure.

buttons.primary: bg-[#0033A0] text-white hover:bg-[#002370] rounded font-semibold transition-colors duration-200 px-4 py-2
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-[#0A0A0A] border border-slate-300 hover:bg-slate-50 hover:text-[#0033A0] rounded font-medium transition-colors duration-200 px-4 py-2
buttons.danger: bg-[#D92D20] text-white hover:bg-[#B42318] rounded font-semibold transition-colors duration-200 px-4 py-2

inputs.style: border border-slate-300 rounded-sm bg-white focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#0033A0] focus:border-transparent text-sm
inputs.labels: text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-[0.1em] text-slate-600 mb-1 block

tables.header: bg-slate-50 text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-[0.1em] text-slate-500 border-b border-slate-200 py-3 px-4
tables.row: border-b border-slate-100 hover:bg-slate-50 transition-colors py-3 px-4

badges.high_risk: bg-red-50 text-[#D92D20] border border-red-200 rounded px-2 py-1 text-xs font-medium
badges.medium_risk: bg-yellow-50 text-[#FDB022] border border-yellow-200 rounded px-2 py-1 text-xs font-medium
badges.low_risk: bg-green-50 text-[#12B76A] border border-green-200 rounded px-2 py-1 text-xs font-medium

data_visualizations.style: Use precise, thin lines. Tooltips should be technical, minimal padding, sharp edges. Grid lines must be subtle.

motion.page_transitions: Minimal. Fade in only. Use framer-motion for micro-interactions on data update, but keep it sterile and fast.
motion.charts: Animate on load. Smooth growing lines or bars.

icons.style: Duotone or Regular weight. Must look technical and professional.

login_background.description: Abstract white wavy surface with grid pattern. Use for login background and overarching app textured backgrounds.

forensic_abstract.description: Abstract swirling patterns with concentric circles (fingerprint like). Use in digital forensics reports or blockchain audit view hero sections.

government_badge.description: Close-up of a government/police badge. Use as a placeholder for the official department logo in headers or sidebars.

accessibility.testing_attributes: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include `data-testid` attribute (e.g., data-testid='fir-submit-button').
accessibility.contrast: Ensure minimum 4.5:1 ratio for normal text. Use #0A0A0A for primary text on white.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install `lucide-react` or `@phosphor-icons/react` for technical, dense dashboards.
Use standard Shadcn components, but customize border-radius to be minimal (rounded-sm) and rely on 1px solid subtle borders.
Ensure the layout mimics a high-tech control room—highly dense, grid-based, using a 12-column or 4-column system.
Do NOT use gradients or soft colorful shadows. Rely on raw, structural CSS.
Implement simulated blockchain ledger visually using Recharts or a custom chronological card list mimicking chain blocks.
For analytics, use Recharts with colors strictly mapped to the functional color palette (#0033A0, #D92D20, #FDB022, #12B76A).
All navigation must be visible on the left sidebar for dashboard views, avoiding desktop hamburger menus.
